description: A letter from Faraḥ b. Ismaʿīl, probably in Fustat, to his father Ismaʿīl b. Faraḥ in Alexandria. Ca. 1057. Faraḥ b. Ismaʿīl writes that he is sending a pouch of dinars with the bearer of the letter and asks his father to exchange them for a different currency. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, p. 691.)
description_he: מכתב מפרח בן ישמעאל, מפוסטאט, לאביו ישמעאל בן פרח, כ-1057, על חילוף מטבע
